name: accounting firms processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10-20 invoices/month, delayed vendor payments cause late fees. We generate automated aging reports instead of manual tracking of invoices and payments.
problem_solved: delayed vendor payments due to lack of timely aging reports
